body.title: Update cc_queue.py — write new tickets to devlab
body.result: cc_queue.py now routes new tickets to devlab.tickets instead of clan.memories; existing clan tickets remain updatable in-place; merged _load() reads both tables; status updates work for both; extended devlab.tickets schema with ALTER TABLE; tested with 3 integration tests
body.intention: I intend that cc_queue.py writes new ticket and decision records to devlab instead of clan.memories so the junk-drawer problem stops growing even before old data is migrated.
body.description:
cc_queue.py currently writes tickets and decisions to clan.memories. Clan is for Igor bootstrap memory only. New writes should go to devlab.

Update cc_queue.py add/close/setstatus/flush_decision paths to write to devlab.tickets (full schema: id, title, status, worker, size, tags jsonb, description, decision_id, metadata jsonb, created_at, updated_at, completed_at). Reads check both clan and devlab during transition window.

HIGH INERTIA: cc_queue.py is the canonical ticket writer — every sprint, Granny dispatch, and context-load depends on it.
**Akien pre-approval required before sprinting this ticket. Stamp approval here.**

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py; SQL migration for devlab.tickets full schema
**Design rules:** no SQLite; external state; backwards-compatible reads during clan transition window
**Scope boundary:** IN — new writes go to devlab.tickets; reads check both during transition. OUT — migrating existing clan ticket records (T-clan-data-audit first); changing any CLI interface.
**Completion criteria:** cc_queue.py add ticket.json writes to devlab.tickets not clan.memories; cc_queue.py list returns merged view from both; existing tests pass; new test verifies devlab.tickets insert path.
